title: rubus hirtus var. lucidus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. lucidus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan thimbleberry, is a species of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. lucidus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
